$comment: Copy to config.json and edit for your install. These values populate NID templates, default capabilities, and budget defaults.
$comment_issuer: Domain fragment in NIDs: urn:nps:agent:{issuer_domain}:{agent_id}. 'dev.localhost' matches @nps-kit/identity DevCA. Override in production with your Org CA's domain.
$comment_issuer_agent: The agent_id that issued/dispatched tasks. main-agent, orchestrator, dispatcher, or whatever your orchestrator calls itself.
$comment_budget: Default per-task NPT ceiling. NPT = NPS Token (raw sum of input + output + cache_read tokens, per NPS-0 §4.3 approximation). Override per-dispatch via --budget or per-category via category_budget_npt below.

category_budget_npt.$comment: Per-category NPT ceiling. Used as the default --budget when the operator does not set one. Operators may override per-dispatch with --budget. Calibrate these values against actual NPT usage in your workload — reference values below are tuned for Sonnet at our typical patterns.
